product.title: VBulletin by Tornevall Tools
product.description: Tornevall Tools integration for vBulletin, including AI-assisted editor tools through the vBulletin API system.

code.installcode: /* * No install code required. * Package files live in /core/packages/vbulletin_by_tools/. */
code.uninstallcode: /* * No uninstall code required. * Files are not removed by product uninstall. */
